title: DAY 20 — FINAL SYNTHESIS ASSESSMENT — ALL 17 MODULES (CRM-M1 THROUGH CRM-M17)

questions.question: A customer calls saying they received the wrong product 3 days after delivery. They want a replacement. Which module's process applies?

options.text: CRM-M8 (RMA Repair & Warranty) — the product is defective
CRM-M9 (Cancellation Retention) — the customer is unhappy and may cancel
CRM-M7 (Return & Replacement) — within 10 days of delivery, wrong product received
CRM-M15 (Prototype Feedback) — all product issues route through feedback first

questions.question: A customer's standard watch has a movement issue. The watch was delivered 4 months ago and the customer has registered for extended warranty. Which module and condition apply?

options.text: CRM-M7 — replacement within 10 days
CRM-M8, Condition A — under warranty (within 1-year total), covered component (movement); free repair
CRM-M8, Condition B — under warranty, not covered issue; chargeable repair
CRM-M15 — repair deferred until final version release

questions.question: A customer wants to cancel an order. The executive checks FIMS — order status is "Shipped." What happens?

options.text: Process the cancellation in FIMS → inform refund timeline
Inform cancellation is not possible once dispatched; redirect to return within 10 days of delivery per the "Return & Replacement — Standard Operating Procedure"
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager for a shipped-order cancellation exception
Mark as NDR and process RTO

questions.question: Shiprocket tracking shows "Delivered" but the customer says they never received the order. Which module handles this?

options.text: CRM-M6 (NDR Management) — the delivery failed
CRM-M7 (Return & Replacement) — the customer wants a refund
CRM-M14 (Shiprocket Operations) — missing shipment; raise platform ticket + Gmail escalation requesting POD
CRM-M9 (Cancellation Retention) — cancel and refund

questions.question: A customer DMs on Instagram asking "What size strap does the Sylvi Hawk have?" Which module and template apply?

options.text: CRM-M13 (FAQ Bank) — product specification question
CRM-M11 (Social Media Operations) — reply via BIK using template A-12 (Size / Wrist Measurement) from the Modified Comment Reply tab
CRM-M5 (BIK WhatsApp) — route to WhatsApp for detailed response
CRM-M10 (Freshdesk) — create a Freshdesk ticket for product queries

questions.question: A COD order is received. The customer doesn't answer 3 confirmation call attempts. The executive makes a DNC call — also unanswered. BIK WhatsApp shows no response. What is the complete action sequence?

options.text: Wait 24 more hours → retry → if still no response → escalate to Asst Manager
After 3 attempts + DNC unanswered + no BIK response → Cancellation Request in FIMS → log in OBC tab (Agent/Date/Order#/Attempts/Status) → log in Cancellation Order tab (all 11 columns)
After 3 attempts → mark as "Unreachable" in the Callback Request Sheet → no further action
After 3 attempts + DNC call → Auto Confirmed → move to To Pack

questions.question: A prototype customer contacts CRM requesting a return and full refund. The watch was delivered 5 days ago. It has a cosmetic scratch — not a manufacturing defect. What is the correct response?

options.text: Process the return — within 10-day window
Process replacement — within 10 days, defect reported

Inform the customer: no return or refund for prototype watches; cosmetic issues do not qualify for replacement (defect/damage only); redirect to the Prototype Feedback Programme for a free upgrade if feedback is submitted within 45 days
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager — all prototype complaints require manager approval

questions.question: An NDR shows "customer unavailable" — 22 hours have passed since the NDR was logged. The executive calls the customer, who confirms they are now available. What are ALL the required steps?

options.text: Mark BPR in Shiprocket → done

Confirm availability → update Shiprocket panel (reattempt delivery) → update FIMS General Comment ("NDR — Customer unavailable — Reattempt initiated — [date]") → update NDR Sheet → update Shiprocket Web Tracker
Call customer → escalate to Shiprocket WhatsApp Group → update Web Tracker
Confirm availability → cancel the order since NDR occurred → process refund

questions.question: A customer emails Freshdesk about a prepaid refund for a cancelled order. It has been 12 business days since cancellation. What should the executive do?

options.text: Reply with the standard refund timeline (7–10 business days) and close the ticket

Verify in FIMS → confirm refund is overdue (>10 business days) → escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack → reply to customer acknowledging the delay → add FIMS General Comment → log in Mails tab
Forward the email to the finance department and close the Freshdesk ticket
Inform the customer refunds take up to 15 business days and ask them to wait

questions.question: A prototype customer submits feedback 40 days after delivery. The feedback is visible in FIMS. The final version is in stock. What is the complete upgrade sequence?

options.text: Confirm eligibility → ship the final version directly — no need to collect the prototype
Confirm 4 conditions met → FIMS → Tools → Prototype Reviews → Actions → Select Models → SKUs → Submit → notify customer (15-day return window, pickup 24–48h) → update Prototype Feedback.xlsx
Confirm eligibility → create an RMA in FIMS → OMS → RMA → Create → process as repair
Confirm eligibility → send BIK campaign to the customer → wait for customer to initiate return

questions.question: A callback request arrives at 2:00 PM. The executive calls at 3:45 PM — no answer. Retries at 4:30 PM — no answer. Retries at 5:15 PM — no answer. What must they do?

options.text: Leave the request open for the next shift
Mark as "Unreachable — 3 attempts" in Comments → set Call Back Done = Yes → log in Callback Request Sheet
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager for a 4th attempt authorisation
Send a WhatsApp message and wait for customer response — do not mark as Unreachable

questions.question: Match each timeline to its correct value: (a) Callback SLA, (b) NDR action window before automatic RTO, (c) Standard return/replacement window, (d) Prototype feedback deadline, (e) Prepaid refund processing.

options.text: (a) 4 hours, (b) 48 hours, (c) 15 days, (d) 30 days, (e) 5–7 business days
(a) 2 hours, (b) 24 hours, (c) 10 days from delivery, (d) 45 days from delivery, (e) 7–10 business days
(a) 1 hour, (b) 24 hours, (c) 10 days from purchase, (d) 45 days from purchase, (e) 7–10 business days
(a) 2 hours, (b) 48 hours, (c) 10 days from delivery, (d) 60 days from delivery, (e) 10–15 business days

questions.question: A standard watch has a cracked glass. The watch is 2 months old. The customer requests a free repair under warranty. What is the correct determination?

options.text: Condition A — under warranty, covered issue; process free repair
Condition B — under warranty, not covered issue; glass is excluded from warranty coverage; offer chargeable repair with written WhatsApp approval before FIMS action
Condition C — out of warranty; chargeable repair
Condition D — Certified Imperfect path

questions.question: A 4-star Judge.me review says "Beautiful watch, great quality!" Should it be published?

options.text: Yes — the text is positive, and 4-star is close to 5-star
No — only 5-star reviews are published; 4-star must be hidden regardless of positive text content
Escalate to Asst Manager — borderline case
Yes — publish but add a note acknowledging the 4-star rating

questions.question: A prototype customer's watch has a manufacturing defect. It is 15 days since delivery. What applies?

options.text: Replacement under the 10-day window — same model, subject to stock
Return and refund — defective products can always be returned
Replacement is not available (past 10-day window); repair is deferred until final version release; redirect to Prototype Feedback Programme
Standard warranty repair under CRM-M8 Condition A

questions.question: A customer cancels a prepaid order worth ₹3,500. The order status is "Shipped." Before informing the customer that cancellation is not possible, what must the executive do first?

options.text: Proceed with the standard shipped-order script — value does not matter
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `customer-care` Slack — the order is ₹3,000+ and shipped; escalation is required before informing
Process the cancellation as an exception — high-value prepaid orders get priority
Redirect to the return process immediately without the shipped-order script

questions.question: Match each action to its correct FIMS path: (a) Create a new RMA repair request, (b) Cancel an order, (c) Verify prototype feedback visibility, (d) Look up an order for a callback.

options.text: (a) OMS → RMA → Create, (b) OMS → Shopify → Order → Cancellation Request, (c) Tools → Prototype Reviews, (d) OMS → Shopify → Orders
(a) OMS → Shopify → Returns, (b) OMS → RMA → Cancel, (c) OMS → Prototype, (d) Tools → Orders
(a) Tools → RMA → Create, (b) OMS → Shopify → Delete Order, (c) OMS → Shopify → Feedback, (d) OMS → Shopify → Search
(a) OMS → RMA → Orders, (b) OMS → Shopify → Order → Cancel, (c) Tools → Prototype Reviews, (d) OMS → RMA → Orders

questions.question: A customer raises a return request via Freshdesk email. After processing, which THREE data entry points must be updated?

options.text: Mails tab, Return/Replace Sheet, FIMS General Comment on the order
BIK tab, NDR Sheet, Shiprocket Web Tracker
IBC tab, Cancellation Order tab, Callback Request Sheet
Mails tab, OBC tab, Prototype Feedback.xlsx

questions.question: Match each escalation type to the correct Slack channel: (a) Prepaid refund not processed after 10 days, (b) QA review of an agent's response quality, (c) Day-start order snapshot posting.

options.text: (a) #customer-care, (b) #after-sale-services, (c) #qaqc-crm
(a) #after-sale-services, (b) #qaqc-crm, (c) #customer-care
(a) #qaqc-crm, (b) #customer-care, (c) #after-sale-services
(a) #after-sale-services, (b) #customer-care, (c) #qaqc-crm

questions.question: An executive needs to send a Shiprocket escalation email about a wrong product delivery. Which Gmail account must be used, and who must be CC'd?

options.text: Personal Gmail account; CC: CRM Asst Manager
Style Feathers Customer Care Gmail; CC: Shiprocket Mail ID + Style Feathers Mail ID
Any Gmail account; CC: Shiprocket Executives
Style Feathers Customer Care Gmail; CC: CRM Manager + #after-sale-services Slack
